title: Whitney Houston
notes:
This is the original version that has "Greatest Love Of All" with a track time of 4:55.
A very similar Indianapolis pressing, [r=458608], has different Side B labels with B4 as 4:49.

℗ & © 1985 Arista Records, Inc.

Catalog #AL 8-8212 can be found on labels.
Catalog #AL8-8212 can be found on the spine, hype sticker and back cover (lower right quadrant).

Runouts are etched except for The Mastering Lab IDs "TML-M", "TML-S", & "TML-X"; Indianapolis "I" and some mastering IDs, i.e. "A2". For Variant 6, the "K" on Side A is etched over an "E".

Publishing:
A1 by The New Music Group/MCA Music (BMI)
A2 by Kashif Music/The New Music Group/MCA Music (BMI)
A3 by Warner Brother Music (ASCAP)
A4 by Prince St. Music (ASCAP)/Screen Gems-EMI Music Inc. (BMI)
A5 by Ensign Music Corporation (BMI)
B1 by Irving Music (BMI)
B2 by Almo Music Corp. (ASCAP)/March 9 Music (ASCAP)/Prince Street Music (ASCAP)
B3 by April Music Inc./And New And Used Music (ASCAP)/Peso Music (BMI)
B4 by Golden Touch Music Corp. (ASCAP)/Gold Horizon Music Corp. (BMI)
B5 by Prince St. Music (ASCAP)/DeCreed Music Publishing Company/Music Corp. of America (BMI)

Some copies came with a hype sticker (check photos).
Some copies were pressed on dark brownish translucent vinyl.

identifiers.description: A1, A2, A4 to B1, B3 to B5

AL8-8212-SA-7 TML-S I A1 C C
AL 8-8212-SA-2 TML-S I A7 I I
AL 8-8212-SB-10 TML-M I A1 II II
AL8 8212 SB 4 TML-M I A1 H
